text.title: semantic-field-naming Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for semantic-field-naming. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every field name must be specific, English, lower_snake_case, and encode unit/format/cardinality information where relevant. No generic placeholders like val, field1, output, result, or flag.
rule.rationale: Generic names force the model to guess what to put there, based only on context. Specific names recruit the model's pre-trained knowledge of what typically goes in an answer, age_years, or is_paid field.
